title: Nharl system
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Equanus system}} {{System |image=[[File:Nharl_system.jpg]] |name=Nharl system |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] |sector=[[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]] |coordinates=K-3 |xyz= |quadrants= |suns=[[Nharl]]{{CSWECite|II|377|Nharl}} |orbits=*[[Equanus]]''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' **1 [[Moon/Legends|moon]] *4 other [[Planet/Legends|planets]] |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes= |other= |species=[[Equani]] {{C|extinct}} |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |population=Several billions {{C|formerly}}{{CSWECite|I|239|Equani}} |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] }} {{Quote|Have you ever heard of the Nharl system?''"
"''No.''"
"''There were five planets around the local sun. One of them was my homeworld, Equanus. You know why you don't see many Equani in the galaxy, Jos? It's because there are only a handful of us left—a few hundred, maybe a thousand at most—of a species that once numbered almost a billion. And do you know why there are so few of us now? It's because only those of us who were offworld two years, six months, and three days ago survived.|[[Klo Merit]] and [[Jos Vondar]]|}} The '''Nharl system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]], within the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Nharl]] was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the system. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including [[Equanus]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Equani]]. {{System-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{ID|Equanus system}} *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} {{ID|Equanus system}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nharl-System |es=Sistema Nharl }} [[Category:Destroyed star systems]] [[Category:Galactic Republic star systems]] [[Category:Star systems in the New Territories]] [[Category:Star systems in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Veragi sector locations]]
